description: Windmill is an open-source, self-hostable workflow engine and developer platform for building internal tools, automations, scripts, flows, and AI-agent integrations. It offers both a hosted cloud instance and self-hosted deployments.
summary: Windmill exposes a REST HTTP API with OpenAPI, a streamable HTTP MCP server, and the `wmill` CLI; developer authentication is primarily via Windmill user bearer tokens, with the HTTP API also accepting authenticated session cookies and MCP additionally supporting OAuth via its gateway URL.
